issue_title: Using deprecated React.findDOMNode — breaks in StrictMode
issue_body:
Several components use React.findDOMNode which is deprecated and triggers warnings in StrictMode. This will break entirely in React 19. Affected components: Tooltip, Popover, and DragHandle.

Warning: findDOMNode is deprecated in StrictMode. findDOMNode was passed an instance of Tooltip which is inside StrictMode.
